---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for voxtty
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case
Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case for this feature.

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
- How would this benefit other users?
- Any examples from other tools?
- Mockups or diagrams (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] I searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This aligns with voxtty's goals (privacy-focused, backend-agnostic)
